dataset_name: SHB Corporate Sales MVP Data Pack V3
data_label: SYNTHETIC DEMO DATA -- NOT A REAL BANKING DOCUMENT
scope_decision: Built to the blueprint's own MVP data pack (section 9.10) and Appendix E fast-track schedule, not the larger 27-section production-data-engineering prompt this repo also received -- explicit user choice, recorded in this session's conversation, given both scopes could not fit before the same-day 2026-07-18 demo referenced by the blueprint's own Appendix E.
generation_method: Records hand-authored directly against the blueprint's own field shapes (Form F-01/F-02/F-09, section 9.16 example records) rather than via a stochastic generator script -- reasonable at this MVP's scale (~80 total records), and every numeric/company value is either taken verbatim from the blueprint document or explicitly marked ASSUMPTION/SYNTHETIC_REALISTIC in the owning file. No official SHB fee, interest rate, or credit limit is asserted anywhere in this pack.

products/product_catalog.json.description: 6 synthetic corporate products per blueprint section 9.10

legal/eligibility_rules.json.description: Blocking/warning rules per blueprint section 9.10 ('5-10 rules'); SYNTH-RULE-WC-FS-001 reused verbatim from the blueprint's own section 9.16 example

legal/banking_policy_documents.json.description: 5 banking policy documents containing official guidelines for KYC, UBO, Payroll, Cash Management, Bulk Payment

operations/sop_workflow.json.description: SOP steps across 4 of the 6 products (see scope_note in the file itself)

shared/companies.json.description: 1 hero case (COMP-ABC, values from blueprint Table 196) + 2 regression cases (clean pass, hard block)

shared/sales_discovery.json.description: Form F-02 records, one per company

scenarios/e2e_golden_cases.json.description: 10 E2E golden cases (6 normal, 2 edge, 1 adversarial, 1 tool failure) per blueprint section 9.10, Form F-09 shape

scenarios/security_cases.json.description: 5 security cases (injection, wrong RM, approval tamper, replay, PII log) per blueprint section 9.10

not_included_from_blueprint_mvp_list.40_rag_queries: Blueprint section 9.10 also lists 40 RAG queries / 40 E2E / 25 security / 20 reliability as a LARGER pilot-scale suite in a different table (Table 329, section 17) than the MVP data pack table (Table 225, section 9.10) this file follows. The MVP table's own numbers (10 E2E, 5 security) were used; the 40/25/20 pilot-scale figures were not built in this pass.
not_included_from_blueprint_mvp_list.vendor_adapter_poc: Section 9.10 R6 ('Một official/vendor adapter POC ở shadow mode') is explicitly 'không bắt buộc cho offline MVP' in the blueprint's own text -- not built.
